Container.Name: AppFlowy-Search
Container.Overview: [Step 6/7] AppFlowy Search — full-text and semantic (AI-powered) search service for AppFlowy Cloud documents. Part of the AppFlowy Cloud stack.
Container.Requires: Custom Docker network named "appflowy" must exist before deploying any container in this stack. Create it via SSH or the Unraid terminal: docker network create appflowy — Network Type is pre-set to "appflowy" by default, verify it is selected.
Container.Description:
AppFlowy Search — provides full-text keyword search and optional AI-powered semantic search over AppFlowy documents. Full-text search works without an OpenAI API key. Semantic/vector search requires AI OpenAI API Key.

Deploy order: (1) AppFlowy-Postgres → (2) AppFlowy-Redis → (3) AppFlowy-MinIO → (4) AppFlowy-GoTrue → (5) AppFlowy-Cloud → (6) AppFlowy-Admin, AppFlowy-Web, AppFlowy-Worker, AppFlowy-Search → (7) AppFlowy-Nginx

Config.Name: Keyword Index Directory
Config.Description: Persistent directory for the full-text (keyword) search index. Must have sufficient free space.

Config.Name: Database URL
Config.Description: PostgreSQL connection string. Must match AppFlowy-Cloud.

Config.Name: Redis URL
Config.Description: Redis connection URL.

Config.Name: JWT Secret
Config.Description: Shared JWT secret. Must be identical to GoTrue and AppFlowy-Cloud.

Config.Name: Use MinIO
Config.Description: Set true to use MinIO.

Config.Name: S3 Access Key
Config.Description: S3/MinIO access key.

Config.Name: S3 Secret Key
Config.Description: S3/MinIO secret key.

Config.Name: S3 Bucket
Config.Description: S3/MinIO bucket name.

Config.Name: MinIO URL (internal)
Config.Description: Internal MinIO API URL.

Config.Name: S3 Region
Config.Description: AWS S3 region (leave empty for MinIO).

Config.Name: OpenAI API Key
Config.Description: OpenAI API key for semantic/vector search and document embeddings. Leave empty to use keyword-only search.

Config.Name: Azure OpenAI API Key
Config.Description: Azure-hosted OpenAI API key (alternative to OpenAI). Leave empty if using standard OpenAI.

Config.Name: Azure OpenAI Endpoint
Config.Description: Azure OpenAI resource endpoint URL.

Config.Name: Azure OpenAI API Version
Config.Description: Azure OpenAI API version string.

Config.Name: Keyword Search Enabled
Config.Description: Enable full-text keyword search. Recommended: true.

Config.Name: Background Indexer Enabled
Config.Description: Continuously index new/updated documents in the background.

Config.Name: Keyword Worker Enabled
Config.Description: Enable the keyword indexing worker.

Config.Name: Database Indexer Enabled
Config.Description: Enable database-level indexing (experimental).

Config.Name: Keyword Index Map Size (bytes)
Config.Description: Memory-mapped file size for keyword index in bytes. Default: 2 GiB. Reduce if RAM is limited.

Config.Name: Listen Host
Config.Description: IP address the search service listens on. :: = all interfaces.

Config.Name: Listen Port
Config.Description: Port the search service listens on (internal).

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Rust log level.
